message:
test(robot): add health --json readiness-contract golden (ilnj9)

Third slice of u9osp's scope (capabilities + models_status shipped prior).
'cass health --json' already exposes the readiness contract ibuuh.9 targets:
state.index (lexical ready/stale/checkpoint), state.semantic (availability/
hnsw_ready/progressive_ready/fallback_mode/hint), state.rebuild (active/
progress counters), plus top-level status/healthy/errors/recommended_action.
Freezing it means schema drift on any of those fields now fails the test.

Changes:
- capture_robot_json(): new ExpectStatus::{ExitOk,ExitAny} parameter.
  cass health exits 1 when reporting uninitialised/unhealthy state — that
  non-zero status is part of the contract and ExitAny lets the capture
  proceed regardless.
- scrub_robot_json(): two new rules — latency_ms→[LATENCY_MS] for the
  wall-clock measurement, and load_per_core/psi_cpu_some_avg10→[LIVE_METRIC]
  for live-sampled kernel metrics that otherwise fluctuate between runs.
- New test health_json_matches_golden against isolated TempDir HOME.
- New golden tests/golden/robot/health.json.golden captures the full
  uninitialised-state payload (status=not_initialized, db.exists=false,
  state.index.status=missing, state.semantic.availability=model_missing,
  runtime_controller block, parallel_wal_shadow block, etc.).

VERIFICATION:
- UPDATE_GOLDENS=1 cargo test --test golden_robot_json → 3/3 pass
- 3 consecutive stable re-runs → 3/3 pass each (no PSI/load drift)
- Pre-existing capabilities + models_status goldens still pass

Closes coding_agent_session_search-ilnj9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,169 @@
+{
+  "status": "not_initialized",
+  "healthy": false,
+  "initialized": false,
+  "explanation": "No cass database or search index exists in [TEST_HOME]/coding-agent-search yet. This is expected on a fresh install or when using a brand-new --data-dir.",
+  "recommended_action": "Run 'cass index --full' once to discover local sessions and build the initial archive.",
+  "errors": [
+    "database not initialized yet",
+    "index not initialized yet"
+  ],
+  "latency_ms": "[LATENCY_MS]",
+  "db": {

+    },

+        "present": false,

+        "db_matches": null,
+        "schema_matches": null,
+        "page_size_matches": null,
+        "page_size_compatible": null
+      }
+    },
+    "database": {
+      "exists": false,
+      "opened": false,
+      "conversations": 0,
+      "messages": 0,
+      "open_error": null,
+      "open_retryable": false,
+      "counts_skipped": false
+    },
+    "pending": {
+      "sessions": 0,

+    "rebuild": {

+        "controller_restore_clear_samples": 3,
+        "controller_restore_hold_ms": 5000,
+        "pipeline_max_message_bytes_in_flight": 402653184,
+        "page_prep_workers": 16,
+        "page_size": 1024,

+    "semantic": {

+      "hnsw_ready": false,
+      "progressive_ready": false,
+      "hint": "Run 'cass index --full' first. Optional later: run 'cass models install' and 'cass index --semantic', or keep using --mode lexical."
+    },
+    "_meta": {
+      "timestamp": "[TIMESTAMP]",

\ No newline at end of file
